assertions.description: The Pico and RP2040Stamp variants have only 648 track segments and 16 vias — the keyboard matrix column nets are unrouted. The connectivity analysis correctly identifies 35 unrouted nets and sets routing_complete=false. BareRP2040 and RP2040Stamp_JLCPCBA are fully routed and correctly show routing_complete=true.
assertions.aspirational_reason: auto-generated check path incorrect for PCB/gerber output
